testcase.name: test_10_wallet_ledger

failure.message: assert 'ledger' in {'entries': [{'amount': 10, 'createdAt': '2026-02-20T06:16:05.487367+00:00', 'entryType': 'CAPTURE', 'holdId': '0ad53a3f-8dd3-4815-a895-f16314e08662', ...}, {'amount': 10, 'capturedAt': '2026-02-20T06:16:05.486817+00:00', 'createdAt': '2026-02-20T06:15:44.393152+00:00', 'entryType': 'HOLD', ...}, {'amount': -10, 'createdAt': '2026-02-20T06:15:44.238778+00:00', 'description': 'Reel script generation: Test <>&\'"!@#$%', 'id': '0f5aacf5-829c-44d8-96da-8ab3a4f9da4b', ...}, {'amount': -10, 'createdAt': '2026-02-20T06:15:37.827806+00:00', 'description': 'Reel script generation: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa', 'id': '373e81f8-1a07-47b6-b4ef-f70ca6e0d989', ...}, {'amount': -10, 'createdAt': '2026-02-20T06:08:23.837458+00:00', 'description': 'Story generation: Adventure - Friendship', 'id': 'e0317ac3-b452-47b8-9a11-d3e491dd1f46', ...}, {'amount': -10, 'createdAt': '2026-02-20T06:07:43.489930+00:00', 'description': 'Reel script generation: ', 'id': 'd20a1ccc-29e6-4cc6-93d0-8e105af498b0', ...}, ...], 'summary': {'totalCaptures': 70, 'totalHolds': 0, 'totalReleases': 30, 'totalTopups': 0}, 'total': 24}

testcase.name: test_13_payment_products

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('subscriptions' in {'gateway': 'cashfree', 'products': {'creator': {'credits': 300, 'name': 'Creator Pack', 'popular': True, 'price': 999}, 'monthly': {'credits': 200, 'name': 'Monthly Subscription', 'period': 'monthly', 'popular': False, ...}, 'pro': {'credits': 1000, 'name': 'Pro Pack', 'popular': False, 'price': 2499}, 'quarterly': {'credits': 500, 'name': 'Quarterly Subscription', 'period': 'quarterly', 'popular': False, ...}, ...}} or 'creditPacks' in {'gateway': 'cashfree', 'products': {'creator': {'credits': 300, 'name': 'Creator Pack', 'popular': True, 'price': 999}, 'monthly': {'credits': 200, 'name': 'Monthly Subscription', 'period': 'monthly', 'popular': False, ...}, 'pro': {'credits': 1000, 'name': 'Pro Pack', 'popular': False, 'price': 2499}, 'quarterly': {'credits': 500, 'name': 'Quarterly Subscription', 'period': 'quarterly', 'popular': False, ...}, ...}})

testcase.failure: test_download_pdf_strict.py:212: in test_13_payment_products assert "subscriptions" in data or "creditPacks" in data E AssertionError: assert ('subscriptions' in {'gateway': 'cashfree', 'products': {'creator': {'credits': 300, 'name': 'Creator Pack', 'popular': True, 'price': 999}, 'monthly': {'credits': 200, 'name': 'Monthly Subscription', 'period': 'monthly', 'popular': False, ...}, 'pro': {'credits': 1000, 'name': 'Pro Pack', 'popular': False, 'price': 2499}, 'quarterly': {'credits': 500, 'name': 'Quarterly Subscription', 'period': 'quarterly', 'popular': False, ...}, ...}} or 'creditPacks' in {'gateway': 'cashfree', 'products': {'creator': {'credits': 300, 'name': 'Creator Pack', 'popular': True, 'price': 999}, 'monthly': {'credits': 200, 'name': 'Monthly Subscription', 'period': 'monthly', 'popular': False, ...}, 'pro': {'credits': 1000, 'name': 'Pro Pack', 'popular': False, 'price': 2499}, 'quarterly': {'credits': 500, 'name': 'Quarterly Subscription', 'period': 'quarterly', 'popular': False, ...}, ...}})
